grant_title: Building a Resilient Newport: Community Grant Funding
eligible_applicant_type: Nonprofit organizations with valid RI Secretary of State certificate of good standing
geographic_restrictions: Applicants must be based in and/or primarily serve residents of the City of Newport, Rhode Island.
project_area: Economic development, public health, arts and culture, recreational opportunities, community well-being, and equity-focused initiatives.
demographic_requirements: Priority given to initiatives that benefit low- and moderate-income individuals and families.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants must be nonprofit organizations with 501(c)(3) status or valid RI Secretary of State certificate of good standing, demonstrate financial transparency, and primarily serve Newport residents. Ineligible applicants include for-profit organizations, businesses, sole proprietors, educational institutions, and organizations with delinquent final grant reports.
